message:
feat(kubernetes): add log streaming, exec, configmap, and secret operations

Add 10 new operations to the Kubernetes connector:
- get_pod_logs: stream container logs with tail/follow/since options
- exec: execute commands in running containers
- configmap.{list,get,create,update,delete}: full ConfigMap CRUD
- secret.{list,get,create,delete}: Secret management

Total operations: 28 (was 18). Tests: 322 (216 unit + 106 integration).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1167,6 +1167,624 @@ common_mistakes = ["Not handling resourceVersion for reconnection"]
 examples = ['{"namespace": "production"}']
 related = ["kubernetes.stream_pod_logs"]
 
+[provides.operations."kubernetes.exec"]

+risk_level = "high"
+safety_tier = "dangerous"
+requires_approval = "interactive"
+idempotency = "none"

+[provides.operations."kubernetes.exec".input_schema]

+type = "object"

+port_allow = [
+    443,
+    6443,

+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = false
+deny_private_ranges = false
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = false
+require_host_canonicalization = false
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 300000
+max_response_bytes = 10485760
+
+[provides.operations."kubernetes.exec".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Run a command inside a running pod container for debugging or maintenance."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Running destructive commands without confirmation",
+    "Not specifying container in multi-container pods",
+    "Using exec for tasks that should be done via Deployments",
+]
+examples = ['{"namespace": "default", "name": "debug-pod", "command": ["ls", "-la", "/app"]}']
+related = [
+    "kubernetes.get_pod",
+    "kubernetes.get_pod_logs",
+]
